description: Creation-pricing-lock (D-GH31/D-GH32) fixture: a campaignBound event (required under D-GH32) plus a small noLock-tagged import burst (well under the anchor on its own) is followed by genuine, non-noLock post-import spending that crosses DATA.level1AP, then a racial-trait purchase. Asserts noLock only exempts the tagged events themselves — real spending after the burst still triggers the automatic lock normally (now that campaignBound has occurred): 'Halfling: Brave' (in the noLock burst) prices at creation rate (2); 'Halfling: Naturally Stealthy' (bought after genuine spend crosses the threshold) prices at the locked tier-2 rate (7).

events.label: Species trait — Halfling: Naturally Stealthy (bought in play)
